description: You are an Infrastructure Capacity Planner preparing a dashboard for the VP of Engineering to visually assess if the primary EC2 instance and the datacenter thermal load are approaching critical limits. Create a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'Executive Capacity Report' containing two graphs. The first graph, titled exactly 'Compute Headroom', must include the metric 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' aliased as 'CPU Usage', colored 'blue', and styled with 'cactiStyle()', along with a constant line at value 85 aliased as 'CPU Limit', colored 'red', and styled as 'dashed()'. The second graph, titled exactly 'Thermal Headroom', must include the metric 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' aliased as 'Core Temp', colored 'orange', and styled with 'cactiStyle()', along with a constant line at value 80 aliased as 'Thermal Limit', colored 'red', and styled as 'dashed()'. Save the dashboard when complete.
